pages.aboutContent: Jamia Darul Uloom Taleem-ul-Quran Shah Mansoor (District Swabi) is a great religious institution located in the spiritual and intellectual center of Shah Mansoor in District Swabi, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. It was established in 1927. For nearly a century, this seminary has been devoted to spreading Islamic knowledge, teaching the Quran and Sunnah, and providing religious guidance to the Muslim Ummah with sincerity and steadfastness. From its inception, the primary objective of this institution has been to produce scholars and graduates who become true inheritors of the Quran and Sunnah, serving the reform of society and the cause of Islam. By the grace of Allah, the institution continues to uphold this noble tradition with full dedication to this day.
pages.admissionsContent: Admissions are open for the new academic year. We welcome students from all backgrounds who wish to pursue Islamic education.
pages.fatawaContent: Browse authentic Islamic rulings from our scholars.
pages.publicationsContent: Explore our collection of Islamic books and research.
